message:
docs(fcp): integrate APR round 4 revisions from GPT Pro 5.2

Integrate 10 revisions from GPT Pro 5.2 Extended Thinking:

1. ZoneIdHash + algorithm-specific nonces
   - Add ZoneIdHash struct with 32-byte BLAKE3 hash for constant-size framing
   - Replace derive_nonce with derive_nonce12 (ChaCha20-Poly1305) and
     derive_nonce24 (XChaCha20-Poly1305) for algorithm-specific handling
   - Prevents nonce-space collisions between different AEAD algorithms

2. CWT/COSE token encoding
   - Add section 7.5.1 specifying RFC 8392 CBOR Web Token encoding
   - Define COSE_Sign1 wrapper structure with mandatory claims
   - Ensures interoperability with standard JWT/CWT tooling

3. Object admission pipeline (quarantine)
   - Add ObjectAdmissionClass enum (Unrestricted/Normal/Sensitive/Critical)
   - Add ObjectAdmissionPolicy with per-class quotas and promotion rules
   - Quarantine store prevents untrusted objects from consuming shared quota

4. ZonePolicy fixes + pattern syntax
   - Add connector allowlist enforcement in ZonePolicy.evaluate()
   - Document glob-only pattern syntax (no regex for security)
   - Remove invalid Tailscale ACL connector deny rules (ACLs only see IPs)

5. Session DoS hardening (HelloRetry + TimePolicy)
   - Add MeshSessionHelloRetry with HMAC-based stateless cookie
   - Add TimePolicy struct with max_skew_secs for clock drift handling
   - Prevents SYN-flood style attacks on session establishment

6. Lease fencing tokens (lease_seq)
   - Add lease_seq field to ExecutionLease and OperationIntent
   - Enables exactly-once execution semantics
   - Stale operations rejected via sequence number validation

7. Multi-writer CRDT state model
   - Add ConnectorStateModel enum (SingleWriter/Crdt)
   - Add CrdtType enum (LwwMap/OrSet/GCounter/PnCounter)
   - Add ConnectorStateDelta for incremental CRDT operations
   - Supports collaborative multi-instance connector deployments

8. DecisionReceipt for explainability
   - Add DecisionReceipt struct with reason_code and evidence
   - Provides audit trail for policy enforcement decisions
   - Aids debugging and compliance requirements

9. SBOM + vuln-scan attestations
   - Add AttestationType::Sbom and VulnerabilityScan variants
   - Add require_sbom and max_allowed_vuln_severity to SupplyChainPolicy
   - Enables software composition analysis in supply chain validation

10. Performance targets + ZoneTransportPolicy
    - Add explicit p50/p99 latency targets with benchmark harness
    - Add ZoneTransportPolicy for policy-driven transport selection
    - Add rotate_object_id_key_on_membership_change to ZoneRekeyPolicy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
